```{=html}
<!-- when_any() + when_all() nested - shows the real power -->
<script>
window.WN_TITLE_PRE = 'filter(when_any(';
// Two when_all groups nested inside when_any
window.WN_GROUPS = [
  {
    label: 'when_all() Group 1',
    text: 'when_all(species == "Adelie", island == "Torgersen", body_mass_g > 3700)',
    color: '#4a86c5'
  },
  {
    label: 'when_all() Group 2',
    text: 'when_all(species == "Gentoo", body_mass_g > 5000)',
    color: '#e8853a'
  }
];
window.WN_TITLE_POST = '))';
window.WN_DATA = [
  ['Adelie',    'Torgersen', '3750'],
  ['Adelie',    'Torgersen', '3800'],
  ['Adelie',    'Dream',     '3250'],
  ['Adelie',    'Biscoe',    'NA'],
  ['Gentoo',    'Biscoe',    '4500'],
  ['Gentoo',    'Dream',     '5700'],
  ['Gentoo',    'Biscoe',    '4450'],
  ['Gentoo',    'Dream',     '5700'],
];
window.WN_COLS = ['species', 'island', 'body_mass_g'];
// Which rows match which when_all group (all conditions must match within group)
window.WN_MATCHES = [
  // Group 1: Adelie AND Torgersen AND body_mass_g > 3700
  [true, true, false, false, false, false, false, false],
  // Group 2: Gentoo AND body_mass_g > 5000
  [false, false, false, false, false, true, false, true]
];
</script>
```

::: {.wn-stage-wrap}
<div id="wn-stage"></div>
:::

[]{.fragment .wn-frag id="wn-group-1"}
[]{.fragment .wn-frag id="wn-group-2"}
[]{.fragment .wn-frag id="wn-result"}
